title: euphrasia collina subsp. muelleri
intro: Euphrasia collina subsp. muelleri, commonly known as the high alpine eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating eye and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Euphrasia collina subsp. muelleri include its ability to alleviate conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and hay fever symptoms, as well as its potential to soothe and calm the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia collina subsp. muelleri include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
